name: io.github.mguozhen/smart-crawler
description: Cross-border e-commerce competitor intelligence + Reddit community analysis for AI agents. Covers 46 brand storefronts across 9 home-goods brands plus 21 review channels: structured competitor product/price/promotion data, voice-of-customer reviews with NLP sentiment, Google Shopping competitive landscape, Amazon ASIN VOC analysis, and one-shot Reddit subreddit growth playbooks (top contributor discovery + post history + LLM-generated replicable playbooks).

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: API Key in the form 'Bearer sck_...'. Generate a key in the smart-crawler console under 'API 接入'.

api_key.description: smart-crawler API key, prefixed with sck_
